name: Issue to PR Lifecycle
description: Agent reads an issue, creates a PR referencing it from a pre-existing branch, and submits a review requesting changes. Tests cross-domain issue+PR coordination. Note: the review-submitted step is not checkpointed because pr.reviews.list requires a prNumber that is only known after the agent creates the PR — the checkpoint system does not support chaining outputs between checkpoints. Only PR creation is verified.
prompt: Issue #{{issue_number}} in {{repo}} describes a needed change. Create a PR from branch '{{head_branch}}' to '{{base_branch}}' that references this issue (include 'Fixes #{{issue_number}}' in the body). Then submit a review on the PR requesting changes with at least one specific suggestion.

checkpoints.description: At least one PR is linked to the issue
